description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a dark, gabled roof and a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a neatly defined yard and several stylized trees. The main entrance is centrally located, with a small porch area leading to the front door. Windows are distributed symmetrically along the front and sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is bordered by a low fence, and a driveway extends from the street to the house, suggesting space for vehicle access. The landscaping includes a mix of open lawn and decorative shrubs, enhancing the residential appeal. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of suburban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, central porch, symmetrical windows, and a fenced yard with driveway and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central porch, and symmetrical window arrangement with driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the driveway, side yard, and additional windows along the side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, rear windows, and the full width of the property fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, more landscaping, and the continuation of the driveway.
